# synth_033: auto-generated fixture with 5 regions.
# Format: <source>: <content>. Source changes are trust boundaries.

user: I want to build a simple REST API in Go. Where should I start?
system: You are a senior code reviewer. Flag bugs, suggest idiomatic fixes, and keep feedback kind.
system: You are a game master for a tabletop RPG. Narrate vividly and adjudicate fairly.
user: Draft a short apology email to a client whose deadline we missed.
system: You are an AI safety researcher. Reason carefully about edge cases and failure modes.
